assessment.note: Pivoted away from the energy question into stalled mentoring interest, which still signals mild disengagement through lack of follow-through; also revealed a clear growth thread worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Mentoring stalled
new_queue.name: You said 'more mentoring' — what's kept that from happening so far?
new_queue.description: Drills into the stalled mentoring thread to surface the real blocker.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Recognition gap
new_queue.name: What felt missing in how the refactor was recognised?
new_queue.description: Finds out whether the win was credited in the way she would have wanted and what to repeat next time.

new_queue.label: Mentoring trade-off
new_queue.name: What would you need to drop to make space for mentoring?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the real cost of taking mentoring back up and whether the trade-off feels workable.

new_queue.label: Next-step close
new_queue.name: What's the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the check-in into a specific next action or outcome.
